name: rederive-the-numbers
triggers: Percentages or multiples are present that are typically derived rather than quoted
Monetary figures are present, often computed from unit price times volume
Aggregates are named (total, sum, average, median, per-user or per-month rates, growth, delta) — derived by definition
The draft asserts a computed number with no visible recomputation
counterindications: Every figure is a labeled quotation from a source; nothing was derived
Numbers are illustrative only; no claim or decision depends on them
